title: Parent status based on subitem status
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m wanting the item status to be based on the status of subitems - exactly like the “show summary on parent items” setting, but this settings adds a new “Subitems Status” column which doesn’t allow a status for ite…

posts.author: mish.pony (Mish P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m wanting the item status to be based on the status of subitems - exactly like the “show summary on parent items” setting, but this settings adds a new “Subitems Status” column which doesn’t allow a status for items with no subitems. I want a single status column - is that possible?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @mish.pony

And what should the parent item status show? Is that kind of summary from all the subitem statuses or just one status? Possibly the app Rollup Subitems can help out here.

posts.author: mish.pony (Mish P)
posts.cookedHtml:
​Thanks @basdebruin, that app does exactly what I want, but unfortunately is way out of our price range.

We wanted a progress summary; exactly like when you select “show summary on parent items” for the subitem status. It looks like we may have to live with a separate “subitem status” column for now (not the end of the world, but not as tidy as I would like).

Thank you!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: I assume you noticed that the price is a one-time payment - no subscriptions
